features.name: Swarm
features.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny piranha. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The swarm can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bites
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) Piercing damage, or 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

tactical_info.combat_role: Aquatic Blood Hunter - High-damage underwater predator swarm
tactical_info.positioning: Water-bound swarm that gains advantage against wounded targets
tactical_info.damage_output: 8 piercing damage (5 when bloodied) with advantage vs wounded foes
tactical_info.key_abilities: Blood frenzy advantage, high swim speed, darkvision
tactical_info.weaknesses: Water breathing only, cannot survive on land
tactical_info.synergies: Devastating in aquatic encounters, especially against wounded parties
